channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bad potholes, 20th March
item.description:
Recently repaired pot holes are in need of further repair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 5,7,9, High Street, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple potholes in a area of 50m, joining up and is very unsafe, 20th March
item.description:
Potholes started last year, more have developed and they connected to create larger holes. Almost looks like a sinkhole is forming. Very unsafe for cyclists as well as any vehicle. Parking spaces are next to it making it very difficult to avoid them and force you into incoming traffic. Main location is this point but it travels all the way down towards Tufnell Park from Toriano avenue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 75, Brecknock Road, Archway, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The speed limit monitor has stopped working in Fen Grove, 20th March
item.description:
The speed limit monitor has stopped working in Fen Grove - resident feels that it can cause people to speed and there 2 schools locally. Can this be looked into please.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Fen Grove, Blackfen, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bonfire, 20th March
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Greater London

item.title: Greenwich council vehicle blocking pathway, 20th March
item.description:
This vehicle has been parked blocking the pathway for three days forcing pedestrians onto the road in order to pass.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Voce Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive litter on pavement and street on Navarino Road 1-40, 20th March
item.description:
Excessive litter throughout pavement, street and gullies of Navarino Road (section 1-40).

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Navarino Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Critical highway defect at Fountain Green Square (SE16 4TX), 20th March
item.description:
URGENT - CATEGORY 1 DEFECT. Multiple missing/sinking paving blocks (see photo) creating a deep void and severe trip hazard. This issue has been reported multiple times since 2023 with only failed "patch" repairs. This defect is a clear breach of Section 41 Highways Act 1980 and has already caused me serious physical injury. Immediate emergency make-safe and permanent reconstruction required. Council is now on formal notice of significant danger to the public at this location.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bermondsey Wall East, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 20th March
item.description:
Constant fly tipping in this area. I don’t think anyone is looking at it. Please make sure this gets sorted asap as it attracts vermin

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterside Close, Thamesmead
